rationale: The citing paper’s core question is an ad-format trade-off between clicks and brand recognition (native vs. display), while the cited paper is a cross-format brand-building comparison (Internet formats vs. TV) centered on brand-recall lift. Given this direct overlap on format effectiveness and brand outcomes—and the cited paper’s methodological contribution on baseline-adjusted recall—it is plausibly a substantive benchmark/foundation rather than an incidental mention.
